subtitle: Busan's half-moon city beach, framed by the illuminated 7.4-kilometer Diamond Bridge and lit by Korea's first permanent weekly drone show and an autumn fireworks festival — a glittering night spectacle reclaimed from a sewage-fouled past.
spike_statement: A half-moon Busan city beach under the illuminated Diamond Bridge, home to Korea's first permanent weekly drone show — a 1970s sewage outfall remade into a light spectacle.

levers.photo_tone: a curved city beach at dusk under the lit span of the Diamond Bridge, neon café signs behind the sand, drones or fireworks blooming over a dark bay, Busan's towers stacked behind
